relationship_disposition.notes: Accepted only as an overlapping term for Policy Reference. Equivalent status is not accepted.

accepted_text: policy-as-code, when used to represent or evaluate policy logic as code or structured policy language. This overlaps with Policy Reference when the policy artifact supplies the rule basis for a transition, but it is not equivalent unless the specific policy artifact and version are cited as the commit-time rule basis.
rejected_text: Policy-as-code is equivalent to Policy Reference.
decision_basis: Open Policy Agent documentation supports policy-as-code style policy evaluation against structured inputs, policies, and data.
Policy-as-code overlaps with Policy Reference because a policy artifact may supply the rule basis for a transition.
Policy Reference is narrower in the wiki context because it identifies the specific cited rule basis used for a transition decision at commit time.
The correct glossary placement is Overlapping Terms, not Equivalent Terms.
non_claims: ALLOW_AS_OVERLAP does not make policy-as-code equivalent to Policy Reference.
ALLOW_AS_OVERLAP does not claim Open Policy Agent endorsement.
ALLOW_AS_OVERLAP does not claim policy evaluation alone satisfies admissibility.
